MPIRE 404

Advanced Agricultural Insecticide for Superior Pest Control

MPIRE 404 is our premium high-concentration insecticide specifically formulated for professional agricultural pest management. Trusted by farmers nationwide, it delivers exceptional control of sucking pests like whiteflies, aphids, thrips, and jassids with its advanced Profenofos 40% + Cypermethrin 4% E.C. (Imidacloprid 40.4% SC) formulation. MPIRE 404 provides superior systemic protection for up to 21 days, ensuring thorough pest control even in challenging conditions. With its enhanced translaminar movement, it effectively reaches pests hiding on the undersides of leaves, maximizing crop protection and yield potential.

High-Concentration Formula Systemic Protection Rain-Resistant Technology

Key Benefits of MPIRE 404 Insecticide

  • Superior Systemic Action

    Rapidly absorbed and distributed throughout the plant for complete protection

  • Extended Protection Period

    Provides continuous pest control for up to 21 days after application

  • Enhanced Rainfastness

    Maintains efficacy even after irrigation or rainfall for reliable protection

  • Translaminar Movement

    Penetrates leaf surfaces to reach pests hiding on undersides of leaves

  • Broad-Spectrum Control

    Effective against over 35 species of sucking pests across multiple crops

Agricultural Pests Controlled by MPIRE 404

Whiteflies

Effectively controls whiteflies in cotton, vegetables, and ornamental crops

Aphids

Eliminates aphid colonies that damage crops and spread viral diseases

Thrips

Rapidly controls thrips populations in vegetables, fruits, and field crops

Jassids

Manages leafhopper infestations that cause hopper burn and yield loss

Mealybugs

Controls mealybugs in cotton, fruits, and vegetable crops

Scale Insects

Effectively eliminates hard and soft scale insects on various crops

Recommended Crops & Applications for MPIRE 404

MPIRE 404 insecticide is specifically formulated for these high-value crops

Cotton

Recommended

Protects against whiteflies, aphids, and jassids in cotton crops

Dosage:125ml per acre
Target Pests:Whiteflies, Aphids, Jassids, Mealybugs

Vegetables

Recommended

Controls sucking pests in vegetable crops ensuring healthy production

Dosage:100ml per acre
Target Pests:Aphids, Whiteflies, Thrips, Mites

Pulses

Recommended

Manages insect pests affecting pulse crops and legumes

Dosage:100ml per acre
Target Pests:Aphids, Thrips, Pod borers

Fruits

Recommended

Protects fruit crops from various sucking pests that reduce quality

Dosage:125ml per acre
Target Pests:Scale insects, Mealybugs, Aphids

Oilseeds

Recommended

Effective against pests affecting oilseed crops like mustard and sesame

Dosage:100ml per acre
Target Pests:Aphids, Thrips, Whiteflies

Ornamentals

Recommended

Preserves the aesthetic value of ornamental plants by eliminating pests

Dosage:100ml per acre
Target Pests:Whiteflies, Aphids, Thrips, Scale insects

MPIRE 404 Technical Specifications

Product Information

Active Ingredient:Profenofos 40% + Cypermethrin 4% E.C. (Imidacloprid 40.4% SC)
Formulation Type:Suspension Concentrate (SC)
Mode of Action:Systemic and Translaminar
Contents:100ml, 250ml, 500ml bottle
Shelf Life:2 years from date of manufacture

MPIRE 404 Usage & Safety Guidelines

Follow these professional recommendations for optimal results and safe handling

Application Guidelines

Recommended Dosage

100-125 ml per acre, depending on pest pressure and crop type

Dilution Rate

Mix with 200-250 liters of water per acre for optimal coverage

Application Method

Foliar spray ensuring coverage of both upper and lower leaf surfaces

Safety Precautions

1

Wear protective clothing, gloves, and face protection during handling and application

2

Avoid inhalation of spray mist; use in well-ventilated areas

3

Store in original container away from food, feed, and water sources

4

Do not apply during bee foraging periods to protect pollinators

Important Notice

Always read the product label and follow instructions carefully. The information provided here is general guidance. For specific crops and local conditions, consult with your agricultural advisor. Optimal application methods may vary by region and crop.

Why Choose MPIRE 404 Insecticide?

See how MPIRE 404 compares to standard insecticides

FeatureMPIRE 404Standard Insecticides
Active Ingredient Profenofos 40% + Cypermethrin 4% E.C. (Imidacloprid 40.4% SC)Lower concentration formulations (typically 17.8% SL)
Pest Control Spectrum Broad-spectrum control of over 35 sucking pest speciesLimited range of target pests
Systemic Action Superior plant absorption and translocationLimited systemic movement in plant tissues
Protection Duration Up to 21 days of continuous protection7-10 days typically requiring reapplication
Rain Fastness Rainfast in 2 hours with minimal efficacy loss after rainfallOften washed away by irrigation or rainfall
Application Rate Lower application rate for equivalent or better controlHigher volumes needed for similar results
Resistance Management Optimized formulation reduces resistance developmentMore prone to pest resistance issues

Frequently Asked Questions About MPIRE 404

MPIRE 404 contains a higher concentration of premium Imidacloprid (40.4% SC) compared to standard products in the market. This allows for lower application rates while achieving superior pest control. Its advanced formulation provides enhanced systemic activity, allowing the active ingredient to distribute throughout the plant tissues more efficiently, protecting even new growth that emerges after application. Additionally, MPIRE 404 features improved rainfastness technology that maintains effectiveness even after rainfall or irrigation.

MPIRE 404 begins working immediately upon contact with target pests and absorption into plant tissues. Feeding inhibition occurs within 30 minutes to 1 hour after application, preventing further crop damage. Visible results typically appear within 24-48 hours, with complete control achieved within 3-5 days. The product remains active in plant tissues for up to 21 days, providing continuous protection against reinfestation.

When used according to label instructions, MPIRE 404 minimizes impact on beneficial insects through its targeted systemic action. For best results, we recommend applying in the evening or early morning when bees and other pollinators are less active. The product is rapidly absorbed into plant tissues after application, reducing exposure to beneficial insects. To protect pollinators, avoid application during flowering periods when possible or apply after flower petals have fallen.

MPIRE 404 is compatible with most commonly used insecticides, fungicides, and foliar nutrients. However, we recommend performing a small jar test to confirm compatibility before mixing large quantities. Avoid mixing with strongly alkaline products as this may affect efficacy. For optimal results, adjust water pH to slightly acidic (pH 5.5-6.5) before adding MPIRE 404 to the spray tank. Our technical support team can provide specific mixing recommendations for your crop protection program.

MPIRE 404 is an excellent component of IPM programs due to its targeted action against sucking pests while minimizing impact on beneficial insects when used correctly. Its long residual activity reduces the number of applications needed, and its efficacy at lower rates means less active ingredient in the environment. For resistance management, we recommend rotating MPIRE 404 with insecticides having different modes of action throughout the growing season. Our agronomists can help design a complete IPM program incorporating MPIRE 404 for sustainable pest management.

What Farmers Say About MPIRE 404

After struggling with resistant whiteflies in my cotton fields, I switched to MPIRE 404. The results were outstanding - complete control within 3 days and protection that lasted through the critical growth period. My yield increased significantly compared to previous seasons.

As a commercial vegetable grower, controlling aphids is crucial for preventing virus transmission. MPIRE 404 provided exceptional control with a single application, protecting my capsicum crop for over three weeks even during rainy conditions.

I've been using MPIRE 404 in my integrated pest management program for fruit orchards. Its systemic action reaches pests even in difficult-to-spray areas, and I've noticed significant improvement in fruit quality due to better pest control.

Ready to Experience Superior Pest Control with MPIRE 404?

Contact our agricultural experts to learn more about how MPIRE 404 can help protect your crops and maximize your yields.

Leading manufacturer of agricultural products committed to sustainable farming solutions and environmental stewardship. Empowering farmers with quality inputs for a better harvest.
